flags.description: Print helper welcome banner without opening a shell
flags.name: --banner

flags.description: Base image used to build the helper image (default "ghcr.io/straubt1/tfx:latest")
flags.name: --base-image string

flags.description: Simulate the execution without changing state
flags.name: --dry-run

flags.description: Optional host directory to mount into the helper at /workspaces
flags.name: --local-directory string

flags.description: Terraform Enterprise admin email used for helper token bootstrap (default "haladmin@localhost")
flags.name: --tfe-admin-email string

flags.description: Terraform Enterprise admin password used for helper token bootstrap (default "hal9000FTW")
flags.name: --tfe-admin-password string

flags.description: Terraform Enterprise admin username used for helper token bootstrap (default "haladmin")
flags.name: --tfe-admin-username string

flags.description: Default Terraform Enterprise organization written to ~/.tfx.hcl (default "hal")
flags.name: --tfe-org string

flags.description: Optional Terraform Enterprise project to ensure during helper token bootstrap
flags.name: --tfe-project string

flags.description: Terraform Enterprise URL used for helper auth bootstrap (default "https://tfe.localhost:8443")
flags.name: --tfe-url string

flags.description: Show raw Docker build logs instead of HAL build animation
flags.name: --verbose

flags.description: Start helper container and open an interactive shell
flags.name: -c, --console

flags.description: Remove the helper container and delete HAL-managed scenario workspaces
flags.name: -d, --disable

flags.description: Build or refresh the Terraform/TFX helper image
flags.name: -e, --enable

flags.description: Rebuild image and recreate helper container
flags.name: -f, --force
